title: asclepias nivea var. normalis
intro: Asclepias nivea var. normalis, commonly known as the white milkweed or white butterfly milkweed, is a perennial plant in the Apocynaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, with benefits including reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
